name: Grounded Hand Soap Lemongass Eucalyptus 5L
shortDescription: GROUNDED Lemongrass & Eucalyptus Hand Soap in a 5L refill size delivers gentle cleansing, a refreshing scent, and cost-effective hygiene for homes, offices, and commercial spaces. Ideal for manual or automatic dispensers.
description: Keep hands fresh, clean, and protected with GROUNDED’s Lemongrass & Eucalyptus Hand Soap , a premium 5-liter refill ideal for homes, workplaces, and high-traffic environments. Infused with the invigorating aroma of lemongrass and eucalyptus, this liquid hand soap delivers a naturally refreshing cleanse while supporting effective hand hygiene. Formulated for frequent use, it gently removes dirt, oil, and everyday impurities without stripping the skin. Many soaps in this class feature moisturizing ingredients or sulfate-free blends, helping maintain soft, hydrated hands even in busy settings. Perfect for manual or automatic dispensers, the large refill size ensures fewer interruptions and long-lasting value. Key Features Generous 5L Volume: Designed for bulk refilling, minimizing maintenance and reducing waste. Refreshing Aroma: Lemongrass and eucalyptus offer a crisp, clean scent with naturally invigorating and mildly antibacterial qualities. Skin-Friendly Formula: Gentle liquid soap crafted to cleanse effectively while helping preserve skin moisture. Versatile Use: Ideal for offices, schools, restaurants, clinics, and large households. Works seamlessly with standard soap dispensers. Cost-Effective & Efficient: The bulk size delivers excellent value for high-use environments. Keep your space stocked, your hands clean, and your environment smelling fresh with this dependable, aromatic hand-care essential.
